title: pedilonum scotiiferum
intro: Pedilonum scotiiferum, also known as New Zealand knotted sedge, is a plant species in the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pedilonum scotiiferum include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
